hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -Eq 'git[[:space:]]+commit.*--amend|git[[:space:]]+rebase|git[[:space:]]+reset.*--hard|git[[:space:]]+tag.*(-d|--delete|-f|--force)|git[[:space:]]+push.*(--force|--force-with-lease|-f)|git[[:space:]]+push.*[[:space:]]:'; then printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"ask","permissionDecisionReason":"Rewriting git history — run: git rev-parse origin/main first. Never amend/move a commit or tag already on origin (you push from the host between turns)."}}'; fi
